name: Ryzeal Plugin
name_jp: ライゼオル・プラグイン
desc: Target 1 of your Xyz Monsters or "Ryzeal" monsters that is banished or in your GY; Special Summon it, then you can attach 1 "Ryzeal" card from your Deck to 1 Rank 4 Xyz Monster you control, also you cannot declare attacks for the rest of this turn, except with Rank 4 Xyz Monsters. You can only activate 1 "Ryzeal Plugin" per turn.
eff: Target 1 of your Xyz Monsters or "Ryzeal" monsters that is banished or in your GY; Special Summon it, then you can attach 1 "Ryzeal" card from your Deck to 1 Rank 4 Xyz Monster you control, also you cannot declare attacks for the rest of this turn, except with Rank 4 Xyz Monsters. You can only activate 1 "Ryzeal Plugin" per turn.

action: Attaches from your Deck as Xyz Material
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
